title: Homelife Crest 1600w Steam Iron/Non-stick Soleplate/Steam or Dry Iron/Water Spray/Adjustable Temperature/Self Clean Anti-drip and Anti-calc / 2m long cord / E7310
features: STEAM, WATER SPRAY AND DRY IRON: With steam, shot of steam, water spray and dry iron functions, this 1600w iron is designed to help remove even the most stubborn creases. With a large 220ml water tank, steam rate of 30g per minute and shot of steam rate at 120g per minute creases don't stand a chance!

VARIABLE THERMOSTAT CONTROL DIAL: Adjusting the dial allows you to set the ideal temperature setting depending on the types of fabrics being ironed. Using the dial, choose from the cotton, linen silk and wool settings or set your own temperature. The red pilot lamp will turn off to indicate the correct temperature has been reached. Get the perfect finish every time.

SELF CLEAN, ANTI-DRIP AND ANTI-CALC: 3 functions designed to make your life easier and maintain the performance of your iron. The self clean button blows air though the steam vents to blow out any mineral deposits preventing these being ejected onto your clothing. Built into the iron, anti-calc reduces the amount of calcium depositions from hard water accumulating inside the iron/steam vents and anti-drip prevents the continuous dripping of water on garments when ironing.
STAINLESS STEEL SOLEPLATE: The stainless steel soleplate glides easily over fabrics and doesn't stick, so there's no worry about damaging garments.
STYLISH, ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The comfortable ergonomic handle allows for greater stability and the heel rest allows you to stand the iron vertically to set aside safely.
description: From the manufacturer 120g/min Steam Boost Iron – 220ml Tank, Full Steam & Spray Functions Tackle wrinkles with ease using a 120g/min steam shot and 30g/min continuous steam. Offers steam, vertical steam, dry and spray options for versatile ironing. Features self-clean, anti-drip and anti-calc systems, plus a 220ml water tank for smooth, reliable performance. 1600W Steam Iron – Stainless Steel Soleplate, 2.0m Cord Built for everyday use with a durable stainless steel soleplate for smooth gliding. Powered by 1600W for efficient performance and a 2.0m cord for easy reach. Compact 29cm length makes it easy to store and handle. A Trusted Brand Offering a Wide Range of Quality Household Products. From steam irons to vacuum cleaners to torches and outdoor gear, each item is made to be user-friendly, ergonomic and help you get daily tasks done quickly and easily.
